title: Fading Clouds
description: Adds an item that lets you walk on air!
body:
# Fading Clouds
Adds an item that lets you walk on air!

## Content
- Fading Cloud item that allows you to walk on air.
- You are able to collect cloud bottles by visiting different biomes, going above the world height, and right-clicking with a bottle.
- You can combine the new smithing template with your newly gathered clouds to add a magical trim to your boots allowing you to spawn clouds that you can climb on.
Whether for traversing the world or just making it easier to complete those tall builds, this trim will make getting around a breeze! 😛
  - hold crouch to disable the boots effects

## Attributions
 - Chronos_Sacaria, co-founder of Timefall Development - teacher

## Localizations/Translations
- English - `en_us`

## Spoilers
- To collect cloud bottles, you'll need to visit 5 different biome temperature types.
  1. Frozen
  2. Cold
  3. Temperate
  4. Warm
  5. Hot
